# Real Fleet Discovery Intake

This worksheet is superseded pre-promotion scratch context. The authoritative
current production inventory is `ansible/inventories/homelab/hosts.yml`; use
that file for all current host facts and automation.

The placeholder records below are retained only as historical scratch notes.
